**What's the use case?**
What are you trying to do that isn't possible (or is awkward) right now?

**Proposed approach (optional)**
If you have an idea of how this could work, sketch it out. See
CONTRIBUTING.md's "Scope" section — protocol/wire-format changes and new
dependencies are worth discussing here before a PR.
